title: Creating a Concise Product Manager File

message.text: Fix everything and create a single manager file and shorten it so that it feels like written by human not AI

turns.suggestedTitle: Creating a Concise Product Manager File

todos.title: Create single manager file
todos.description: Create a single concise manager file at src/com/cdac/manager/product_manager.java that implements AddProduct, ViewAllProducts, SearchByID, UpdateProduct, DeleteProduct, SortbyName, SortbyPrice, SortbyQuantity, SortbyRating in the same style as the provided code. Keep it short and simple, fix obvious bugs (no duplicate adds/removes) and use the existing Product API (setname/getname, etc.).
